violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. 3rd compartment of dish sinks not to be used for wiping cloth storage. Sanitizer concentration in wiping cloth bucket on prep line not maintained at proper concentration.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Styrofoam noodles used as bump guards on shelving in BOH prep area. Particle board shelf in BOH prep area not sealed. Shelf in FOH worn and has exposed particle board and needs sealing.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
